title: 3. FuKe (11.24) (specially good effect) 针妇科穴
text:
MenJin is an effective point for dysmenorrhea since it can relive pain, soothe the liver Qi and regulate the liver
and spleen. NeiTing which lies just in front of MenJin, is also quite effective. FuKe is the main point for
gynecopathy and is also effective for dysmenorrhea. Generally speaking, MenJin is used to treat acute painful
diseases and FuKe is for the chronic ones. All the diseases of the uterus can be treated with FuKe.
